allow: Bash(node -e "const c = require\('./src/lib/constants'\); console.log\('Jurisdictions:', c.JURISDICTIONS.length\); const regions = {}; c.JURISDICTIONS.forEach\(j => { regions[j.region] = \(regions[j.region] || 0\) + 1; }\); Object.entries\(regions\).sort\(\(a,b\) => b[1]-a[1]\).forEach\(\([r,c]\) => console.log\('  ' + r + ': ' + c\)\);")
